CustomField.description: Amount of rent per Rent Period, as per the Lease. If PBH Rent is selected, this is the Fixed portion of PBH Rent, as per the Lease.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Amount of rent per Rent Period, as per the Lease. If PBH Rent is selected, this is the Fixed portion of PBH Rent, as per the Lease.
CustomField.label: Base Rent
